title: BOOM: Benchmarking Out-Of-distribution Molecular Property Predictions of Machine Learning Models

data.name: BOOM benchmark datasets
data.reason: Benchmark data may be large; fetch through the upstream instructions.

original_evaluation: OOD molecular property prediction across BOOM benchmark tasks
Model-task comparisons over common molecular property prediction settings
core_generalization_finding: Molecular property prediction models can struggle under chemically meaningful OOD shifts.
spectra_demo_hook: Turn BOOM-style OOD benchmarks into continuous audits over chemical novelty and property extrapolation.
